nodes.body: Fixed in this revision: WORKBOARD.md banner now uses `reviews.*` / `review_gates.*` (backticked, escaped) instead of the raw `reviews./review_gates.` form. Thanks for catching the typo.
Fixed: removed the duplicate `4.` and renumbered the Suggested next CSs list to `4.`/`5.`/`6.` so each item is uniquely indexed.

Fixed: LRN-136 disposition now references the actual paths — gate at `scripts/checks/check-review-log-evidence.mjs` (PR-side, CS51-introduced) and test extension in `tests/cs51-review-gates-logic.test.mjs`. The earlier `scripts/check-review-log-evidence.mjs` / `tests/check-review-log-evidence.test.mjs` paths did not exist.

Fixed in CS54 plan R4 amendment: D54-3 wording now narrowly scopes the change to `detect decorated parentheticals on the Model column` and explicitly states it does NOT change the existing display-name → bare-id normalisation behavior in `scripts/checks/check-independence-invariant.mjs`. Fresh GPT-5.5 R4 plan review attached (hash 43bacd049c23, Go).

Fixed in CS54 plan R4 amendment: T5 and Deliverables now point at the actual PR-side gate `scripts/checks/check-review-log-evidence.mjs` (CS51) and test target `tests/cs51-review-gates-logic.test.mjs`. The previous `scripts/check-review-evidence.mjs` target was wrong — that script validates `## Model audit`/`## Review log` column-shape and timestamps but does not inspect the model-cell decoration. Fresh GPT-5.5 R4 plan review attached (hash 43bacd049c23, Go).

Fixed: R4 timestamp bumped from 2026-05-27T17:27:30Z to 2026-05-27T17:50:00Z so the final row is now chronologically latest (R1=17:30 < R2=17:40 < R3=17:45 < R4=17:50). Hash unchanged (43bacd049c23) since timestamp is outside Decisions+Deliverables sections. `harness lint`: 30/0/3 pass.

In the LRN-135 cross-reference, “REVIEWS.md § 2.7 (Review log schema)” points to the wrong section. In this repo, the Review log schema lives under **REVIEWS.md § 2.8 (PR body requirements)** (see REVIEWS.md around the `## Review log` example table). Update the reference so follow-up work doesn’t chase the wrong section.

LRN-136 refers to “REVIEWS.md § 2.7 (Review log schema)”, but §2.7 is “Finding disposition”. The Review log table schema is documented in **REVIEWS.md § 2.8 (PR body requirements)**. Updating this reference will prevent CS54 from editing the wrong section.

In the Goal list, item 4 says to lock the Review log Model rule into “REVIEWS.md § 2.7”, but the Review log requirements are in **REVIEWS.md § 2.8 PR body requirements** (where the `## Review log` example table lives). Please update the section reference so the CS54 deliverable points to the correct location.

The plan describes documenting the narrow re-attest pattern in a few different (and conflicting) places: D54-4 says “REVIEWS.md § Plan review”, while Deliverables says “new sub-section under `## Plan review`”, and T4 says to add it under the rubber-duck review section + cross-reference REVIEWS.md § A4. Please align these so it’s clear the narrow re-attest applies to PR stale-diff currency (A4) rather than clickstop plan-review attestation.

T5 and the Deliverables bullets reference “REVIEWS.md § 2.7 (Review log schema)”, but §2.7 is Finding disposition; the Review log schema/example table is under **REVIEWS.md § 2.8 PR body requirements**. Please update these references (including the `template/composed/REVIEWS.md` bullet) so the planned edits target the correct section.
